TextView.android:text: Disable double tap to swap\nitems in hands.
Adjust the time required to\ntrigger long press actions.
Adjust the size of all\non-screen buttons.
Adjust the size of the\nvirtual mouse cursor.
Adjust the movement\nspeed of the mouse.
Start the virtual mouse\nwhen the game launches.
Set the gyroscope sample\nrate for smoother input.
Customize and remap controller\nbuttons and actions.
